plugins.name: legal-prompt
plugins.description: French legal toolkit for Claude — search Légifrance codes, French case law (Cour de cassation et juridictions du fond), the Journal Officiel, and collective bargaining agreements (KALI). Includes 5 slash commands, 5 auto-triggered skills, and 4 preconfigured MCP servers. Built for lawyers, in-house counsel, and law students who need AI that cites official sources.
